source_pr.title: tikv: stable TestPanicInRecvLoop test
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/16069 Problem Summary: some test still fail on TestPanicInRecvLoop when test machine under heavy load, this try to make it more stable ### What is changed and how it works? What's Changed, How it Works: - remove the global variable modification - simplify test port explore logic - give more time to let recvLoop have chance recovery from panic ### Related changes - n/a ### Check List Tests - Unit test(only test) Side effects - n/a ### Release note - No release note --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/19434)

evidence: evidence: PR title: stable TestPanicInRecvLoop test.

evidence: refines PanicInRecvLoop test path by adjusting timeout/connection count usage and test timeouts/failpoint usage (store/tikv/client.go, store/tikv/client_fail_test.go, store/tikv/mock_tikv_service_test.go).
